mapper.select:
SELECT id, dve_name, tag_no, name, model_specification, manufacturer, installation_location_and_purpose, medium_name, design_temperature, pressure_before_valve, pressure_after_valve, valve_seat_diameter, valve_body_material, valve_seat_serial_number, valve_seat_material, valve_core_material, valve_stem_material, flow_characteristics,
leakage_class, cv_value, actuator_model_specification, actuator_action_form, actuator_stroke, spring_range, air_source_pressure, fault_position, valve_close_time, valve_open_time, handwheel_mechanism, dv_type, status, factory FROM control_valve
and tagNo like CONCAT( #{queryParams.tagNo}, '%')
and dvType = #{queryParams.dvType}
and status like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.status}, '%')
and factory like CONCAT ('%',#{queryParams.factory}, '%')

SELECT id, dve_name, tag_no, name, model_specification, manufacturer, installation_location_and_purpose, medium_name, design_temperature, pressure_before_valve, pressure_after_valve, valve_seat_diameter, valve_body_material, valve_seat_serial_number, valve_seat_material, valve_core_material, valve_stem_material, flow_characteristics, leakage_class, cv_value, actuator_model_specification, actuator_action_form, actuator_stroke, spring_range, air_source_pressure, fault_position, valve_close_time, valve_open_time, handwheel_mechanism, dv_type, status, factory FROM control_valve
and tagNo like CONCAT( #{tagNo}, '%')
and dvType = #{dvType}
and status like CONCAT ('%',#{status}, '%')
and factory like CONCAT ('%',#{factory}, '%')
